data.title: Vote on Trump’s CFTC chair pick could come today, US senator says
data.description:

data.title: Microsoft challenges a $2.8 billion lawsuit in UK over cloud computing licenses
data.description:
Microsoft returned to the spotlight on Thursday as it was accused of overcharging tens of thousands of British businesses that rely on Windows Server while using cloud platforms operated by Amazon, Google, and Alibaba. The claim, worth £2. 1 billion, is now before the Competition Appeal Tribunal, which has been asked to certify the case so […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/microsoft-defies-a-2-8bn-uk-lawsuit/

data.title: Bank of Mexico warns fragmented global rules expose stablecoins to stress, arbitrage
